name: CitroTech Inc.
business: CitroTech Inc. sells environmentally sustainable specialty chemical fire inhibitor products, including CitroTech formulation and CitroSafe Systems, to wildland fire, residential home protection, and wood products industries across the United States and Canada.

exposures.sentence: We are an environmentally sustainable specialty chemical company focused on fire inhibitor products serving the wildland fire, residential home protection, and wood products industries across the United States and Canada.
The Company is also actively deploying proactive wildfire defense systems on residential and commercial properties under the CitroSafe Systems brand.

The Company is working with a large insurance broker to offer insurance coverage to customers who install a CitroSafe proactive wildfire system, with policies underwritten by established insurance carriers. This program is currently in the proof-of-concept phase.

catalysts.event: Established relationships with lumber and building material companies for Class A rated lumber treatment
catalysts.sentence: In addition, in early 2026 we began establishing relationships with lumber and building material companies that are using CitroTech to treat wood products to be Class A rated lumber under an issued Technical Evaluation Report (TER).

tamClaims.claim: Fire-retardant market forecast to be $13.6 billion globally by 2034
tamClaims.sentence: Future Markets Insights, a market researcher in Pimpri-Chinchwad, India, projects that the fire-retardant market is forecast to be $13.6 billion dollars globally by 2034.
